summary: Verified all 3 bug fixes from main agent: 1) Print and Edit buttons added to nested job modal in shipments page, 2) Memo upload button works correctly, 3) Group certificate scan upload works for stones in certificate groups. All features functioning as expected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 reported bugs from user have been fixed. Nested job modal in shipments has Print, Edit buttons and memo upload. Group certificate scan upload works correctly for stones in certificate groups.

test_flows_completed.details: Print button (data-testid='print-job-shipment-button') opens print popup window with title 'Job #17 - GRS Global'. Contains full job details, stones table, and totals.
Edit button (data-testid='edit-job-shipment-button') shows edit form with amber border styling. Contains Status dropdown, Notes textarea, Cancel button, and Save Changes button.

test_flows_completed.feature: Nested job modal - Memo upload button
test_flows_completed.details: Upload Memo button (data-testid='upload-memo-shipment-button') is visible and connected to file input. Shows 'No memo uploaded' when empty and provides Replace/Upload functionality.

test_flows_completed.feature: Group certificate scan upload - Backend API
test_flows_completed.details: PUT /api/stones/group/certificate-scan returns 200 with message 'Certificate scan uploaded for 2 stones in group 1'. Route ordering fixed - group endpoint defined before {stone_id} endpoint.

test_flows_completed.feature: Individual stone certificate scan - Backend API
test_flows_completed.details: PUT /api/stones/{stone_id}/certificate-scan still works correctly, returns 200 with success message. Route ordering doesn't break existing functionality.

test_flows_completed.feature: Group certificate scan upload - Frontend UI
test_flows_completed.details: Stone modal shows Certificate Scan section with 'Group 1' badge, 'Uploaded' status, and informational message: 'This stone is part of Certificate Group 1. Uploading a scan will apply to all stones in this group.' Provides Replace Scan and View Scan buttons.

bugs_verified_fixed.issue: Nested job modal missing Print button
bugs_verified_fixed.fix: Added Print button with handlePrintJobInShipment function that opens new window with formatted job details

bugs_verified_fixed.issue: Nested job modal missing Edit button
bugs_verified_fixed.fix: Added Edit button that toggles editJobMode state, shows edit form with status dropdown and notes textarea, Cancel/Save buttons
Memo upload button exists and works correctly. Uses memoInputRef to trigger file input, handleMemoUploadInShipment handles the upload to API

bugs_verified_fixed.issue: Certificate scan upload for grouped stones shows error
bugs_verified_fixed.fix: Backend route ordering fixed - /stones/group/certificate-scan defined before /stones/{stone_id}/certificate-scan to prevent FastAPI from treating 'group' as a stone_id parameter

api_tests_run.response: Certificate scan uploaded for 2 stones in group 1

screenshots_taken: job17_with_buttons.png - Nested job modal showing Print, Edit, and Upload Memo buttons
edit_form_visible.png - Edit form with Status dropdown, Notes textarea, Cancel and Save Changes buttons
stone_modal.png - Stone modal showing Certificate Group 1 with group certificate scan upload functionality
